creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
Created attachment 198674
svn diff

Minor update:
- Fix links to downloadable hosts file after upstream's upstream made some changes to WindowsSpyBlocker.
- Add security/ca_root_nss as a run-time dependency (needed to download the hosts files over https).

Upstream has not rolled a new release yet, but I'm patching this in to keep functionality as expected. The host collection from WindowsSpyBlocker will not be downloaded or updated without this patch.
